title: Was the SDF-1 paste intentional on ZAI-10?
summary: Two new comments on ZAI-10 are pastes from SDF-1 (Onboarding) — no clear ask. Need direction before re-closing.

questions.prompt: What did you want me to do with the SDF-1 paste on ZAI-10?

options.label: Reference — keep ZAI-10 open
options.description: Hold ZAI-10 in_review pending your follow-up.

options.label: Action needed in SDF instance
options.description: I will open a separate task there (note: cross-instance work needs your authorization).

options.label: Other — explain in a comment
options.description: Reply on the issue with details.

options.label: Prep a merge proposal
options.description: I will draft a child issue with merge readiness summary for your review.

options.label: Wait until ZAI-58 lands, then prep
options.description: Hold off until the dialog regression is verified done.
